hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */agent/ose-researcher.md) ./scripts/sync-agent.sh >/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage":"sync-agent: plugin copy regenerated from agent/ose-researcher.md"}' ;; */plugins/ose-knowledge/agents/ose-researcher.md) ./scripts/sync-agent.sh >/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage":"sync-agent: the plugin copy is GENERATED — direct edits are overwritten from agent/ose-researcher.md"}' ;; esac; }
